title: clematis tsugetorum
intro: Clematis tsugetorum, also known as Japanese Clematis or Tsugetorum Clematis, is a flowering vine native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Clematis tsugetorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote relaxation. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
